price_path_status: Facility/grant/test production exists; KRX and customer-yield price backfill required

normalization_adjustment: credit customer/design role; cap before order size, revenue, repeat design win, and OP/EPS

normalization_adjustment: apply governance and value-allocation haircut until actual order and shareholder-value link appear

normalization_adjustment: credit second-wave component exposure; cap when inventory or customer detail is missing

price_path_status: Theme can run before mass-production revenue
normalization_adjustment: route research, but block Green before design-win revenue, royalty/license, mass production, and OP/EPS

price_path_status: Labor/production disruption can interrupt delivery and customer confidence
normalization_adjustment: apply operational disruption overlay to Samsung-exposed supply-chain candidates

price_path_status: IP leakage and China catch-up reduce Korea semiconductor moat and valuation room
